attributes.title: DHCP — Total Events
attributes.description: Total Zeek DHCP events (event.dataset=dhcp). MITRE TA0007 Discovery / T1018 Remote System Discovery — DHCP inventories LAN hosts.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DHCP \u2014 Total Events", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: DHCP — Unique Clients (MAC)
attributes.description: Distinct client MACs leasing addresses (cardinality source.mac). A new MAC is a new device on the LAN. MITRE TA0007/T1018.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DHCP \u2014 Unique Clients (MAC)", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "source.mac"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: DHCP — Operations
attributes.description: DHCP message types observed (dhcp.message_types: DISCOVER/OFFER/REQUEST/ACK/NAK/RELEASE). MITRE TA0007/T1018. Excess NAK or rogue OFFER can indicate a rogue DHCP server (T1557).
attributes.visState: {"title": "DHCP \u2014 Operations", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "dhcp.message_types", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": true, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}}

attributes.title: DHCP — Operations Over Time
attributes.description: DHCP message volume over time split by type (dhcp.message_types). MITRE TA0007/T1018. Spikes track device churn / lease renewals.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DHCP \u2014 Operations Over Time", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "scaleMetricValues": false, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "dhcp.message_types", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 8, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Event Count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: DHCP — IP / MAC / Hostname Inventory
attributes.description: Client IP ↔ MAC ↔ hostname mapping from DHCP leases (source.ip × source.mac × dhcp.host_name) — the LAN asset inventory the PFELK IP/MAC flow conveyed. MITRE TA0007 Discovery / T1018 Remote System Discovery. False positives: randomised (private) MACs from phones rotate frequently.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DHCP \u2014 IP / MAC / Hostname Inventory", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.ip", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 25, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.mac", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 2, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "dhcp.host_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 2, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": "", "showToolbar": true}}

attributes.title: DHCP — Assigned Addresses
attributes.description: Addresses handed out by the DHCP server (dhcp.assigned_addr × source.mac). MITRE TA0007/T1018.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DHCP \u2014 Assigned Addresses", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "dhcp.assigned_addr", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 25, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.mac", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 2, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": "", "showToolbar": true}}

attributes.title: DHCP — Top Client Hostnames (Tag Cloud)
attributes.description: Client-advertised hostnames (dhcp.host_name); word size scales with lease activity. MITRE TA0007/T1018 — spot unexpected/rogue device names. False positives: IoT devices re-lease often.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DHCP \u2014 Top Client Hostnames (Tag Cloud)", "type": "tagcloud", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "dhcp.host_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 40, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"scale": "linear", "orientation": "single", "minFontSize": 14, "maxFontSize": 60, "showLabel": true}}

attributes.title: DHCP — Activity by Client over Time (Heat Map)
attributes.description: Heat map of DHCP activity per client over time — a bright row is a device leasing/renewing abnormally often (flapping NIC, rogue client, or address exhaustion probe). MITRE TA0007/T1018. False positives: short-lease IoT devices renew frequently.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DHCP \u2014 Activity by Client over Time (Heat Map)", "type": "heatmap", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "source.ip", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "heatmap", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "enableHover": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "colorsNumber": 5, "colorSchema": "Blues", "setColorRange": false, "colorsRange": [], "invertColors": false, "percentageMode": false, "valueAxes": [{"show": false, "id": "ValueAxis-1", "type": "value", "scale": {"type": "linear", "defaultYExtents": false}, "labels": {"show": false, "rotate": 0, "overwriteColor": false, "color": "black"}}]}}

attributes.title: DHCP — Lease Log (Discover)
attributes.description: Timestamped Zeek DHCP lease log. MITRE TA0007 Discovery / T1018 Remote System Discovery, TA0006 (T1557 rogue DHCP). False positives: routine lease renewals dominate.

attributes.title: SURU — DHCP Visibility (Zeek)
attributes.description: Zeek-observed DHCP lease activity from suru-zeek-* (event.dataset=dhcp). MITRE: TA0007 Discovery (T1018 Remote System Discovery), TA0006 Credential Access context (T1557 rogue DHCP/MITM). False positives: randomised phone MACs and short-lease IoT devices churn frequently; a new MAC/hostname is worth a glance but is usually a benign new device.
